overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a purple and black outfit observing NPCs repairing a car under a concrete overpass, then walking through a sunlit post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland featuring massive derelict structures and crashed aircraft wreckage.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass mechanic workshop with car repair

events.description: camera zooms in close to the car engine bay for detailed inspection view
mechanic closes the car hood, ending the repair scene

agents.ego_description: character circles around the group, observing the car repair from various angles and looking at the engine work

notable_agents.action: mechanic with green cap leaning deep into the engine bay working on components
mechanic with blue hair standing by the car holding tools and watching

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shade overhead
weathered gray sedan with open hood being repaired
rusted orange scaffolding supporting the overpass
tattered red flags hanging from the structure
crumbling multi-story industrial buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: Under a massive concrete overpass, a group of mechanics works on a rusted sedan with its hood open. The character circles the scene, observing the repair work while the camera captures details of the engine bay. The area is sheltered from direct sun, with industrial ruins visible in the background and dry grass growing through cracks in the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from underpass to open wasteland

events.description: exits the covered underpass area into the open industrial wasteland
emerges from shadow into bright harsh sunlight, causing exposure shift

agents.ego_description: character walks away from the mechanic group, leaving the underpass and heading into the bright open wasteland

entered.detail: large rusted construction vehicle with treads sitting idle
massive cylindrical concrete towers in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the mechanic group behind and walks out from under the overpass into harsh sunlight. The environment transitions from the enclosed concrete shelter to an open wasteland, with massive industrial silos becoming visible in the distance and an abandoned bulldozer sitting to the side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial wasteland with derelict mega-structures

events.description: massive crashed aircraft wreckage becomes prominent in the center of view
character slows slightly while passing concrete barriers and observing surroundings

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through the wasteland, surveying the massive industrial ruins and crashed aircraft while navigating around debris

notable_agents.action: wasteland dweller standing guard by concrete barriers holding a rifle
group of figures scavenging near the crashed aircraft wreckage

entered.detail: massive destroyed aircraft or spaceship fuselage lying on its side with smoke rising
large concrete blocks marking path boundaries
thick yellow industrial hoses snaking across the ground
rusted orange crane arm extending over the ruins

segments.scene_description: Walking through the vast open wasteland, the character approaches a massive crashed aircraft wreckage surrounded by industrial ruins. The terrain is dusty with sparse dry bushes, and concrete barriers line the path. A wasteland dweller stands guard near the barriers while distant figures move near the crash site, and the camera captures the scale of the derelict industrial silos and construction cranes dominating the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shaded shelter of a concrete overpass into the blinding glare of an open industrial wasteland. It begins by circling a group of mechanics working on a rusted sedan, capturing the intricate details of the open engine bay amidst dry grass and concrete ruins. As the character leaves the repair crew behind, the camera moves forward, shifting from the cool shadows of the overpass into harsh, direct sunlight. The scene then expands into a vast landscape where the enclosed concrete walls give way to a wide horizon featuring an abandoned bulldozer and massive industrial silos looming in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast, dusty wasteland that gradually reveals the immense scale of a crashed aircraft and industrial ruins. It begins with the character traversing an open expanse of dry terrain and sparse bushes, moving steadily toward a massive wreckage site. As the camera advances, the path is framed by concrete barriers where a wasteland dweller stands guard, while distant figures become visible near the crash. The scene then expands to encompass the surrounding environment, shifting focus from the immediate wreckage to the towering derelict industrial silos and construction cranes that dominate the horizon.
